title: Sword Parry
description: Parry projectiles! Adds an enchantment called parry. Fully server-side
body:
[![Swills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModderZellior/Image/main/bannerofswills.jpg)](https://swills.gg/?ref=ZELLIOR)

**Sword Parry** adds a timing-based combat mechanic to Minecraft.

When holding a sword enchanted with Parry, players can deflect incoming projectiles by timing their swings correctly.

There are 3 levels:

Parry I — Deflect projectiles

Parry II — Deflect with double speed and damage

Parry III — Creates a slowing field around the player and deflects with double speed and damage

Projectiles such as arrows, tridents, fireballs, wither skulls, and more can be redirected back toward enemies.

A successful parry produces visual sparks.

Trading and enchanting with an enchanter is supported.

Works with all projectiles(except shulker bullets)

Fully server-side.
